buildCommand: node -e "const p=require('./package.json');const r=require('./public/vercel-release.json');if(r.version!==p.version||r.validation!=='PASS')throw new Error('public release does not match validated source')" && test -s public/index.html && test -s public/src/game.js && test -s public/assets/hero.png && echo 'Validated Chroniques de Solenne static release ready'
